scope_review.summary: The implementation remained backend-only. Relative to the step-4 merge baseline, the final code changes are confined to `backend/server.py`, `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, and this step's task artifacts; no frontend or docs migrations were introduced.

steps.description: Focused health-route regression gate covering the six plan-required public route assertions plus one new GET-dispatch regression for shared public health routing.
Full backend API module replay after the focused health-route gate passed.

notes: The backend GET handler now uses `PUBLIC_HEALTH_ROUTES` so the public health surface stays aligned across the service index, direct router, and HTTP dispatch.
Legacy `/health` and `/healthz` behavior remains unchanged; `/v1/health` stays additive and HTTP-200 based.
